notes: Models vibe's presession proc-<PID> → session_<ts> dir → /compact → session_<ts2> dir lifecycle. Compaction takes the SAME reset_session dir-rotation code path as /clear (agent_loop.compact → _reset_session, keep_parent=True), so it surfaces as old-session-ends + new-session-born, NOT a single continuous row; the append-only messages.jsonl is never truncated so there is no append-tailer bug. session_birth matches the proc-<PID> ready; v1_session_handoff matches the real session_<ts> dir in ready (new_session); v1 phases pin to v1_session_handoff. compact_boundary requires a fresh session_<ts2> dir (new_session:true) minted by /compact — born WORKING because its first persisted line is the injected (role=user,injected=True) compaction-context message (parser → user_message, opens a turn), not yet settled. old_session_ended requires transcript_removed for the v1 session (same-PID cleanup, pid_manager.go:566-576, #169 path — NOT the presession row). The post-compaction turn drives working→ready on the new dir, proving continuation. Emission ORDERING and the born-working state are provisional: clear_history/compact persists the old dir first, then _reset_session mints the new dir whose messages.jsonl materializes at compaction save — max_delay bounds are generous and record tightens them. Observations assert model (mistral-medium-3.5, from live sidecars, passes NormalizeModelName unchanged) + tokens_nonzero (sidecar context_tokens on turn_done, DROPPED post-compaction); cost is NOT asserted (daemon emits no per-turn cost for vibe).

text: Pre-session row (proc-<PID>) appears in ready within 1s of launch
PID bound within 1s (DiscoverPID by cwd + cmdline)
After the first prompt lands, the session_<ts> dir appears in ready — proc-<PID> hands off to the real vibe session
First user prompt populates context: ready → working on the session_<ts> session
First turn completes back to ready (same session dir)

/compact rotates to a fresh session_<ts2> dir never seen before (new_session:true) — the compaction boundary. Born WORKING: its first persisted line is the injected compaction-context user message (no turn_done yet). expected_state is provisional (born-working vs a brief ready) — record settles it from the live /compact.
Old (pre-compaction) session disappears — same-PID cleanup emits transcript_removed for the session_<ts> dir when the new session binds the same vibe PID (bound provisional pending record).
Post-compaction user prompt drives the NEW session working (must NOT match a stale transition on the old dir) — proves the session continues after compaction
Post-compaction turn completes back to ready on the new session; final state ready
